source: REAL headless FCP PAEHSVAdjust (FCT_HSV_WORKINGSPACE), param-bound sweeps 2026-07-23
finding: FCP's HSV CPU wiring CLAMPS all three params before the shader:

clamps.Hue: max(0, Hue) — NEGATIVE hue is a NO-OP (input unchanged); positive rotates. Verified -pi..2pi on saturated red.
clamps.Value: min(2, max(0, Value)) — the ws-multiply saturates at 2.0. Gray 32: Value 1/1.5/2 -> mult 1/1.5/2, but 2.5/3/4/5 all -> mult 2.0 (out 124.3).
clamps.Saturation: satFactor = max(0, 1+Sat) — Sat<=-1 all give full-gray desaturation (73.5 on red); Sat below -1 does NOT invert chroma.

engine_fix: hueSaturationFilterWS: hue=max(0,hue); valMul=min(2,max(0,value)); satFactor=max(0,1+saturation). All three were gate-invisible (shipping HSV hosts author Hue=0 and moderate Sat/Value).
impact: negative hue was up to 62 lvl off; Value>2 up to 130 lvl; Sat<-1 inverted chroma.
